items.title_cn: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
items.title_en: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
items.summary_cn: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

items.title_cn: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
items.title_en: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
items.summary_cn: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.
